heading: Defenses and exceptions
label: 3122 Defenses and exceptions
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 422 of this title

Amendments2002—Subsec. (c). substituted “either congressional intelligence committee” for “the Select Committee on Intelligence of the Senate or to the Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence of the House of Representatives”.Pub. L. 107–306
amendments: Amendments2002—Subsec. (c). substituted “either congressional intelligence committee” for “the Select Committee on Intelligence of the Senate or to the Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence of the House of Representatives”.Pub. L. 107–306

children.heading: Disclosure by United States of identity of covert agent
children.label: a Disclosure by United States of identity of covert agent
children.text: It is a defense to a prosecution under that before the commission of the offense with which the defendant is charged, the United States had publicly acknowledged or revealed the intelligence relationship to the United States of the individual the disclosure of whose intelligence relationship to the United States is the basis for the prosecution.section 3121 of this title

children.heading: Conspiracy, misprision of felony, aiding and abetting, etc.
children.label: b Conspiracy, misprision of felony, aiding and abetting, etc.

children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), no person other than a person committing an offense under shall be subject to prosecution under such section by virtue of section 2 or 4 of title 18 or shall be subject to prosecution for conspiracy to commit an offense under such section.section 3121 of this title

Paragraph (1) shall not apply (A) in the case of a person who acted in the course of a pattern of activities intended to identify and expose covert agents and with reason to believe that such activities would impair or impede the foreign intelligence activities of the United States, or (B) in the case of a person who has authorized access to classified information.

children.heading: Disclosure to select congressional committees on intelligence
children.label: c Disclosure to select congressional committees on intelligence
children.text: It shall not be an offense under to transmit information described in such section directly to either congressional intelligence committee.section 3121 of this title

children.heading: Disclosure by agent of own identity
children.label: d Disclosure by agent of own identity
children.text: It shall not be an offense under for an individual to disclose information that solely identifies himself as a covert agent.section 3121 of this title
